sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31437" key="ei)sne/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰσνέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n31437.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go into,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐς δὲ νέονται οὐρανόν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.59</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.[Thess.]).</sense> </entryFree>
